title: WorldDownloaderLegacy
description: A legacy Forge mod that allows you to make backups and archive Minecraft worlds
body:
# WorldDownloaderForge
A legacy Forge mod that allows you to make backups and archive Minecraft worlds

This is a port of a project made by Pokechu22 (mainainer) & other contributors.

This port was intended to run on Forge 1.8.9, but I ended up doing:  `1.9.4-liteloader` -> `1.9.4-forge` -> `1.8.9 forge`, so there's also a 1.9.4 version available.
I'll maybe eventually port 1.12.2.  

# Permission
I've got permission from Pokechu to make this fork
![Permission-fork](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/33488576/227806844-d7843197-e7bc-4699-aba1-8bc62803da31.png)

And for the modrinth upload
![Permission-modrinth](https://github.com/Nixuge/WorldDownloaderForge/assets/33488576/22911b83-63f1-4655-9711-5623d15f42e1)
(github is @ https://github.com/Nixuge/WorldDownloaderForge or in the sidebar)


#### See on github for an in-depth readme, eg for the build instructions, known issues & todos
